patch:
--- a/firmware.c
+++ b/firmware.c
@@ -19,11 +19,12 @@
 
 /**
  * @brief Initialize UART peripheral
- * @param port  UART port number (0-3)
- * @param cfg   Pointer to configuration struct
+ * @param port    UART port number (0-3)
+ * @param cfg     Pointer to configuration struct
+ * @param clk_hz  Peripheral clock frequency in Hz
  * @return 0 on success, negative error code on failure
  */
-int uart_init(uint8_t port, const uart_config_t *cfg);
+int uart_init(uint8_t port, const uart_config_t *cfg, uint32_t clk_hz);
 
 /**
  * @brief Transmit data over UART
